text.title: ML/AI Decision Framework Tree
text.summary: Two-axis tree: approach branch first, then model tier. Branches cite observables; leaves cite rule ids from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: What is the specialization class (none / behavioral / factual)?

branch.question: Does ANY hold: data is private, OR change_frequency in {daily,weekly,hourly}, OR citations_required, OR corpus exceeds context after compression?
Is requests_per_month ≥ 1,000,000 AND ft_roi_calc present AND breakeven ≤ 6 months?

decision-tree.root-question: After approach is set, what model tier matches the task?

text.example: specialization_class=factual → any_rag_trigger=true (private + weekly + citations) → approach=rag. irreversible_error=false, standard_generation=true → model_tier=standard (Sonnet).
specialization_class=behavioral → ft_eligible=true (1.5M/mo + ROI 3.5mo) → approach=fine-tune. simple_extraction=true post-FT → model_tier=nano (Mini).
